title: The 10-piece capsule wardrobe that actually works
excerpt: Premium essentials over trend chasing — how to build a wardrobe that stays useful for three years, not three months.

sections.heading: What a capsule wardrobe actually is
sections.body: A capsule wardrobe is not a minimal wardrobe. It is a deliberate one. The goal is a tight selection of high-utility pieces that combine freely, photograph well, and degrade slowly. You are building quality of use, not quantity of options.

sections.heading: The foundation pieces
sections.body: Every capsule starts with a heavyweight black tee, one structured hoodie, one clean cargo or straight-leg pant, and a versatile jacket. These four pieces need to survive daily wear, machine washing, and years of rotation. Fabric matters more than price at this stage — heavyweight jersey, dense fleece, and twill with good construction are non-negotiable.

sections.heading: The hardware layer
sections.body: A capsule without accessories looks complete but not considered. Two or three pieces of consistent jewelry transform a basic tee-and-pant combination into a deliberate outfit. A clean chain necklace, a signet ring, and one bracelet in matching finishes can be worn in combinations that make six different looks from three pieces.

sections.heading: Color discipline
sections.body: Neutrals are not boring — they are modular. A wardrobe built around black, off-white, slate grey, and one warm earth tone can combine in any order without clashing. Prints, bright colors, and trend-specific pieces age quickly and limit your combinations. One statement color accent is fine; building around it is not.

sections.heading: What to skip
sections.body: Skip anything that requires a specific outfit to make sense. If a piece can only be worn one way, with one combination, it is a liability — not an asset. The ten-piece capsule is an investment. Every piece should earn its slot by being versatile enough to wear in at least four distinct combinations.

cta.heading: The Obsidian Drop was built for this.
cta.body: Oversized tee, cropped hoodie, cargo pant, chain necklace, and signet ring. Every piece designed to combine.
